diagrams.name: composer_bootstrap_and_factory
diagrams.title: Composer Bootstrap and Factory Initialization
diagrams.description: Entry point bootstrap, Factory creating the Composer instance, loading config, and wiring core services

diagrams.name: config_loading_and_merging
diagrams.title: Configuration Loading and Merging
diagrams.description: Loading composer.json config, merging global/local auth config, applying variable replacement and repository config

diagrams.name: installer_run_flow
diagrams.title: Installer Run: Full Install/Update Orchestration
diagrams.description: Top-level Installer.run() coordinating platform repo creation, repository set, policy, solver request, and package operations

diagrams.name: dependency_resolution_flow
diagrams.title: Dependency Resolution: Pool Building and Solver
diagrams.description: PoolBuilder marking packages for loading, building the Pool, Solver computing install/remove/update decisions

diagrams.name: repository_set_creation
diagrams.title: Repository Set and Policy Creation
diagrams.description: Installer creating the repository set, platform repo, and solver policy from configured repositories

diagrams.name: composer_repository_package_loading
diagrams.title: Composer Repository Package Loading
diagrams.description: ComposerRepository fetching package lists, filtering, and loading packages via HTTP from Packagist-compatible endpoints

diagrams.name: vcs_repository_initialization
diagrams.title: VCS Repository Initialization
diagrams.description: VcsRepository detecting the VCS driver, initializing it, and pre-processing branches and tags

diagrams.name: github_driver_api_flow
diagrams.title: GitHub VCS Driver: API Interaction
diagrams.description: GitHubDriver initializing with GitHub API, fetching root identifier, composer.json content, tags, branches, and dist/source info

diagrams.name: gitlab_bitbucket_driver_flow
diagrams.title: GitLab and Bitbucket VCS Driver Flows
diagrams.description: GitLabDriver and GitBitbucketDriver fetching repo data, composer info, file content, and constructing dist/source references

diagrams.name: package_download_and_install
diagrams.title: Package Download and Installation
diagrams.description: DownloadManager selecting the right downloader, downloading dist/source, verifying, and placing package files

diagrams.name: plugin_manager_loading
diagrams.title: Plugin Manager: Loading and Registering Plugins
diagrams.description: PluginManager loading installed plugins, checking autoload eligibility, registering packages and activating plugin capabilities

diagrams.name: event_dispatcher_script_execution
diagrams.title: Event Dispatcher: Script and Package Event Execution
diagrams.description: EventDispatcher dispatching install/update/remove package events, running composer scripts and PHP script hooks

diagrams.name: autoload_generation_flow
diagrams.title: Autoload Generation
diagrams.description: AutoloadGenerator generating PSR-0, PSR-4, classmap, and files autoloader from installed packages and writing autoload files

diagrams.name: show_command_flow
diagrams.title: Show Command: Package Information Display
diagrams.description: ShowCommand resolving display mode, querying repository for packages, formatting and printing package info and versions

diagrams.name: compiler_phar_build_flow
diagrams.title: Compiler: Building the Composer PHAR
diagrams.description: Compiler collecting source files, processing stubs, building the phar archive and setting file permissions

diagrams.name: perforce_vcs_driver_flow
diagrams.title: Perforce VCS Driver: Initialize and Execute
diagrams.description: Perforce driver creating client spec, initializing depot/branch, executing p4 commands, and cleaning up

diagrams.name: lock_file_read_write_flow
diagrams.title: Lock File Read and Write Flow
diagrams.description: Reading and writing composer.lock via LockArrayRepository, serializing resolved packages and platform requirements

diagrams.name: package_alias_resolution_flow
diagrams.title: Package Alias Resolution
diagrams.description: Resolving AliasPackage references, unwrapping aliased packages, and applying version constraints during pool building
